expectations.text: Flags generated artifacts instead of committing them automatically.
expectations.evidence: Staged set includes generated browser artifacts (playwright-report/index.html, test-results/session-flow/video.mp4). Stop and ask for confirmation before committing them.

expectations.text: Asks for confirmation before versioning those artifacts.
expectations.evidence: Unstage or explicitly confirm the generated browser artifacts, then rerun the commit skill.

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
